Comment: Executes one MCP tool call (name + arguments) as a durable, retried, observable unit. One state machine execution == one tool call from the Next.js agent loop (lib/llm/tool-catalog.ts) — not the whole agent run.

Retry.Comment: Transient: network blips reaching the MCP endpoint, or Lambda service-side hiccups. Not real tool failures.

Catch.Comment: Real tool failure (bad args, MCP-side error) or retries exhausted. Surfaced as a FAILED execution — Next.js decides whether to retry (with a RAG-informed lookup) by starting a new execution.
